kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY VOLCANO ACTIVITY NOTIFICATION
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Episode 45 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption began at 1:34 AM HST on April 23.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
